heading: Sale of articles, signs, and solicitation in Supreme Court Building and grounds
label: 6132 Sale of articles, signs, and solicitation in Supreme Court Building and grounds
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)613240:13h., .Aug. 18, 1949, ch. 479, § 363 Stat. 616
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)613240:13h., .Aug. 18, 1949, ch. 479, § 363 Stat. 616

children.text: to offer or expose any article for sale in the Supreme Court Building or grounds;
to display a sign, placard, or other form of advertisement in the Building or grounds; or
to solicit fares, alms, subscriptions, or contributions in the Building or grounds.
